---
title: '201402/28 Journal Fri'
date: '2014-02-28T13:55:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1467223274332426345'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/20140228-journal-fri.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<h4>
VOD:</h4>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<a href="https://www.bible.com/users/darrellwolfe/reading-plans/28-joseph-prince?initial=true&amp;user_id=darrellwolfe" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Day 108</a>Call It Forth!<br />Romans 4:17<br />17… God, who gives life to the dead and calls those things which do not exist as though they did;</blockquote>
<br />
<h4>
Thankful:</h4>
Thankful that I have so much experience to speak from during an interview. Thankful that God has a plan for me.<br />
<br />
<h4>
Feeling:</h4>
Discouraged that I didn't find exactly what I wanted in the first ten minutes of this Job search and land the first job I wanted.<br />
<br />
Hopeful that if I keep pumping eventually water will pour. (Zig Ziglar)<br />
<br />
<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
<br />
Got up late today. Headed to work. Wife and kids are coming.<br />
<br />
DW<br />
<br />
PS: God... I can't deal with Sallie Mae. Take care of that! Please.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
